mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no as orderNo, user_id as userId, status, total_amount as totalAmount, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createdAt FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, order_no as orderNo, user_id as userId, status, total_amount as totalAmount, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createdAt FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(total_amount), 0) FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId}
